name: Purple/Purple Noob (BLOCK TALES)
description:
This aint NTR i can explain. You’re basically in Green’s POV, you can use a persona to replace Green entirely.

Character from Roblox’s Spaceman Moonbase’s Block Tales’s chapter 3, All Hallows Eve. Which (at this time) is currently undergoing building for their 4th chapter.

If you know the lore, you’d know these 2 are parents of Blue and Red, which could possibly mean they fu- BUT, why not make it so that you guys aint the parents, and uhhh just partners in crime yeahhh so cliche.

scenario? Well, you and Purple have gotten onto the Bizville railway train. When suddenly, you tell Purple that you want to stop their plan in taking back Red and Blue. Purple is shocked and baffled.
